ddls:
CREATE TABLE "borrower_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrower profile */,
  "accounts_opened" INTEGER /* Number of accounts opened by the borrower */,
  "bankruptcies" INTEGER /* Number of bankruptcies declared by the borrower */,
  "collections" INTEGER /* Number of accounts in collections */,
  "credit_history" INTEGER /* Length of the borrower's credit history */,
  "credit_inquiries_last_6_months" INTEGER /* Number of credit inquiries in the last 6 months */,
  "judgements" INTEGER /* Number of judgements against the borrower */,
  "past_due_accounts" INTEGER /* Number of past due accounts */,
  "open_accounts" INTEGER /* Number of open accounts */,
  "card_utilization" REAL /* Credit card utilization ratio */,
  "tax_liens" INTEGER /* Number of tax liens against the borrower */,
  "high_credit_limit" INTEGER /* High credit limit of the borrower */,
  "annual_income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the borrower */,
  "historical_result" INTEGER /* Historical outcome of the borrower's credit applications */,
  "address" TEXT /* Borrower's permanent address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Borrower's date of birth */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Borrower's employment status */,
  "credit_mix" TEXT /* Borrower's credit mix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borrower's profile */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., credit card, loan) */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date the account was opened */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Date the account was closed, if applicable */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the account (e.g., open, closed, past due) */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the account */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "payment_history" TEXT /* Payment history for the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES borrower_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit inquiry */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borrower's profile */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date the credit inquiry was made */,
  "inquiry_type" TEXT /* Type of the inquiry (e.g., new account, credit increase) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Outcome of the inquiry */,
  "inquiry_amount" REAL /* Amount associated with the credit inquiry */,
  "inquiry_result_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the credit inquiry outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_inquiries_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES borrower_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit event */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borrower's profile */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., payment, default) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_amount" REAL /* Amount associated with the credit event */,
  "event_description_extended" TEXT /* Extended description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_history_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES borrower_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borrower's profile */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the score was calculated */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the credit score */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of the credit score (e.g., FICO, VantageScore) */,
  "score_range" TEXT /* Range of the credit score */,
  "score_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the credit score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES borrower_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lending_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lending decision */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borrower's profile */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "decision_type" TEXT /* Type of the lending decision (e.g., approved, denied) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan or credit line */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Terms of the lending decision */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the lending decision */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate associated with the lending decision */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the lending decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lending_decisions_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES borrower_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_details" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income detail */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borrower's profile */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of the borrower's income */,
  "annual_income" INTEGER /* Annual income from the source */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the income was verified */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the income was verified */,
  "income_verification_method" TEXT /* Method used to verify the borrower's income */,
  "income_verification_result" TEXT /* Outcome of the income verification process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_details_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES borrower_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the risk model (e.g., logistic regression, decision tree) */,
  "model_performanceMetrics" TEXT /* Detailed performance metrics for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
